summary: Completed testing of Scheme of Work CRUD, auto-expand textareas, and MyFiles delete operations. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/schemes creates scheme record (200)
Backend: GET /api/schemes returns schemes array (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/schemes/{id} deletes scheme (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/lessons/{id} deletes lesson (200/404)
Backend: DELETE /api/notes/{id} deletes note (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/dictations/{id} deletes dictation (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/uploads/{id} deletes upload (200/404)
Backend: Scheme with empty competencies array accepted (200)
Backend: Scheme with Tanzania Mainland syllabus accepted (200)
Frontend: Scheme of Work page loads with Zanzibar/Tanzania Mainland toggle
Frontend: Toggle changes header from ZANZIBAR to TANZANIA MAINLAND
Frontend: Toggle changes column headers (Umahiri Mkuu, Shughuli Kuu, etc.)
Frontend: Add Row button adds new row and jumps to last page (Page 1 of 1 -> Page 2 of 2)
Frontend: Save to My Files button saves scheme via POST /api/schemes (button shows 'Saved to My Files!')
Frontend: Print button opens print window with full table content
Frontend: Export as DOCX downloads .doc file (Scheme_of_Work_TestExport_Zanzibar.doc)
Frontend: Textarea cells auto-expand height (80px -> 125px) when text is entered
Frontend: My Files shows 5 stat cards (Lessons, Schemes, Notes, Dictations, Uploads)
Frontend: My Files shows scheme cards with Calendar icon and delete button
Frontend: My Files filter dropdown includes 'Schemes of Work' option
Frontend: Delete scheme button removes scheme from My Files (1 Schemes -> 0 Schemes)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_scheme_crud.py - Created comprehensive backend tests for iteration 7
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_School_Playwright scheme for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Scheme of Work features verified working: (1) Add Row adds row and jumps to last page, (2) Save to My Files saves via POST /api/schemes, (3) Print opens print window with full table, (4) Export as DOCX downloads .doc file, (5) Textarea cells auto-expand (overflow:hidden + JS autoResize), (6) Zanzibar/Tanzania Mainland toggle changes headers. MyFiles delete operations work for all types (lessons, notes, dictations, uploads, schemes). PesaPal payments remain MOCKED.

real_integrations.POST /api/dictation/generate: Real OpenAI TTS via Emergent LLM key
real_integrations.POST /api/lessons/generate: Real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key

scheme_of_work_add_row.details: Add Row button adds new row and automatically navigates to last page

scheme_of_work_save.details: Save to My Files button saves scheme via POST /api/schemes, button shows success message

scheme_of_work_print.details: Print button opens new window with formatted scheme table for printing

scheme_of_work_export_docx.details: Export as DOCX downloads HTML-based .doc file that MS Word can open

scheme_of_work_textarea_autoexpand.details: Textarea cells auto-expand from 80px to 125px when multi-line text is entered

scheme_of_work_toggle.details: Zanzibar/Tanzania Mainland toggle changes header and column labels

myfiles_5_stat_cards.details: My Files shows 5 stat cards: Lesson Plans, Schemes, Notes, Dictations, Uploads

myfiles_scheme_display.details: Schemes appear in My Files with Calendar icon, subject, class, term, school info

myfiles_delete_all_types.details: Delete buttons work for all file types (lessons, notes, dictations, uploads, schemes)

myfiles_filter_schemes.details: Filter dropdown includes 'Schemes of Work' option
